entities.name: NCT02906930
entities.context: PIONEER 1 (NCT02906930): Phase 3 interventional trial of oral semaglutide versus placebo in type 2 diabetes mellitus treated with diet and exercise only

attributes.descriptive_title: Efficacy and Safety of Oral Semaglutide Versus Placebo in Subjects With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus Treated With Diet and Exercise Only

entities.name: semaglutide
entities.context: Oral semaglutide administered once daily at doses of 3 mg, 7 mg, and 14 mg as experimental intervention

entities.name: placebo
entities.context: Oral placebo administered once daily as comparator arm

entities.name: 3 mg oral semaglutide QD
entities.context: Experimental arm: semaglutide 3 mg administered orally once daily

entities.name: 7 mg oral semaglutide QD
entities.context: Experimental arm: semaglutide 7 mg administered orally once daily

entities.name: 14 mg oral semaglutide QD
entities.context: Experimental arm: semaglutide 14 mg administered orally once daily

entities.name: Placebo oral QD
entities.context: Placebo comparator arm: oral placebo administered once daily

entities.name: Arm: 3 mg oral semaglutide
entities.context: Experimental cohort receiving semaglutide 3 mg orally once daily

entities.name: Arm: 7 mg oral semaglutide
entities.context: Experimental cohort receiving semaglutide 7 mg orally once daily

entities.name: Arm: 14 mg oral semaglutide
entities.context: Experimental cohort receiving semaglutide 14 mg orally once daily

entities.name: Arm: Placebo
entities.context: Placebo comparator cohort receiving oral placebo once daily

entities.name: Diabetes Mellitus, Type 2
entities.context: Subjects with type 2 diabetes mellitus treated with diet and exercise only, HbA1c 7.0-9.5%

entities.name: Novo Nordisk A/S
entities.context: Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S

entities.name: Change in HbA1c
entities.context: Primary endpoint: change from baseline (week 0) to week 26 in glycosylated haemoglobin (HbA1c)

attributes.assessment_method: In-trial observation period and on-treatment without rescue medication observation period

entities.name: Change in Body Weight (kg)
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in body weight (kg) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in Fasting Plasma Glucose
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in fasting plasma glucose from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in Mean 7-point SMPG Profile
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in mean 7-point self-monitored plasma glucose profile from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in Mean Postprandial Increment Over All Meals in SMPG
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in mean postprandial increment over all meals in SMPG from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in Fasting Insulin
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in fasting insulin (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in Fasting Pro-insulin
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in fasting pro-insulin (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in Fasting Glucagon
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in fasting glucagon (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in HOMA-IR
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in HOMA-IR (insulin resistance, ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in HOMA-B
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in HOMA-B (beta-cell function, ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: Change in CRP
entities.context: Secondary endpoint: change in CRP (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26

entities.name: HbA1c
entities.context: HbA1c between 7.0-9.5% required for inclusion; also the primary efficacy endpoint

attributes.use: Patient selection (inclusion criterion) and primary endpoint

entities.name: Adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus on diet and exercise only
entities.context: Male or female, age ≥18 years, diagnosed with type 2 diabetes for ≥30 days, HbA1c 7.0-9.5%, treated with diet and exercise only for ≥30 days prior to screening

entities.name: Phase 3
entities.context: Phase 3 interventional study of oral semaglutide versus placebo

relations.evidence: Lead Sponsor: Novo Nordisk A/S
Phase: PHASE3
Trial investigates efficacy and safety of oral semaglutide in subjects with type 2 diabetes mellitus
Experimental arms test oral semaglutide at 3 mg, 7 mg, and 14 mg doses
Experimental arm: 3 mg oral semaglutide administered once daily
Experimental arm: 7 mg oral semaglutide administered once daily
Experimental arm: 14 mg oral semaglutide administered once daily
Placebo comparator arm: oral placebo administered once daily
Semaglutide evaluated for treatment of type 2 diabetes mellitus in subjects on diet and exercise only
Primary endpoint: change from baseline (week 0) to week 26 in HbA1c
Secondary endpoint: change in body weight (kg) from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in fasting plasma glucose from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in mean 7-point SMPG profile from week 0 to week 26

relations.target_entity: Change in Mean Postprandial Increment Over All Meals in SMPG
relations.evidence: Secondary endpoint: change in mean postprandial increment over all meals in SMPG from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in fasting insulin (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in fasting pro-insulin (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in fasting glucagon (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in HOMA-IR (insulin resistance, ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in HOMA-B (beta-cell function, ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26
Secondary endpoint: change in CRP (ratio to baseline) from week 0 to week 26
HbA1c 7.0-9.5% required for inclusion; also used as primary efficacy endpoint

relations.target_entity: Adults with type 2 diabetes mellitus on diet and exercise only
relations.evidence: Enrolled adults ≥18 years with type 2 diabetes, HbA1c 7.0-9.5%, treated with diet and exercise only
Experimental arm: 3 mg oral semaglutide once daily
Experimental arm: 7 mg oral semaglutide once daily
Experimental arm: 14 mg oral semaglutide once daily
Placebo comparator arm: oral placebo once daily
